# MuleSoft FTP Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.0) of FTP Connector documentation.
> See [FTP Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the FTP Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Connect to an FTP Server Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/ftp-connection.md)
- [Configuring a Proxy for FTP Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/ftp-connector-proxy.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating FTP Connector to Version 2.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/ftp-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Copy and Move Files with the FTP Connector Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/ftp-copy-move.md)
- [Create a Directory Using FTP Connector Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/ftp-create-directory.md)
- [FTP Connector 2.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/ftp-documentation.md)
- [Connect to FTP Servers Dynamically Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/ftp-dynamic-connection.md)
- [FTP Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/ftp-examples.md)
- [List Files Using the FTP Connector Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/ftp-list.md)
- [Trigger a Flow When a New File Is Created or Modified Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/ftp-on-new-file.md)
- [Disable Pooling in the FTP Connector Configuration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/ftp-pooling.md)
- [Read a File Using the FTP Connector Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/ftp-read.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure FTP Connector 2.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/ftp-studio-configuration.md)
- [Troubleshooting FTP Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/ftp-troubleshooting.md)
- [Write a File Using the FTP Connector Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/ftp-write.md)
- [FTP Connector XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/ftp-xml-maven.md)
- [FTP Connector 2.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ftp-connector/latest/index.md)
